Chinese table tennis athlete Sun Yingsha took the stage as the representative of Asian athletes during the closing ceremony of the Paris Olympics on Sunday.

She joined athletes from around the world in the symbolic extinguishing of the Olympic flame, marking the end of the 16-day global sporting spectacle.

The 23-year-old secured two gold and one silver medals at the Paris Olympics.
